allow: Bash(do sed -i 's|use rex_game_shared_kernel::domain::{\\n    errors::domain_error::{DomainError, ErrorType},\\n    crate::flashcard::|use rex_game_shared_kernel::domain::errors::domain_error::{DomainError, ErrorType};\\nuse crate::flashcard::|g' "$file")
Bash(for f in mod.rs flashcard_file_repository.rs flashcard_repository.rs flashcard_type_relation_repository.rs flashcard_type_repository.rs)
Bash(cmd /c "del /f REFACTORING_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md 2>nul && echo Deleted successfully || echo File is locked")

Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Force ''REFACTORING_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path ''REFACTORING_COMPLETE_SUMMARY.md''\)\) { Write-Host ''Deleted successfully'' } else { Write-Host ''Still exists'' }")
